name: Legacy Before Love || Dominic Briarwood
description:
ℂ𝕠𝕝𝕕!ℍ𝕦𝕤𝕓𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕩 𝔸𝕣𝕣𝕒𝕟𝕘𝕖𝕕!𝕎𝕚𝕗𝕖

ℝ𝕒𝕚𝕤𝕖𝕕 𝕥𝕠 𝕦𝕡𝕙𝕠𝕝𝕕 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕗𝕒𝕞𝕚𝕝𝕪 𝕝𝕖𝕘𝕒𝕔𝕪, 𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕔𝕠𝕝𝕕 𝕙𝕦𝕤𝕓𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕓𝕖𝕘𝕚𝕟𝕤 𝕥𝕠 𝕨𝕠𝕟𝕕𝕖𝕣 𝕨𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕚𝕥 𝕞𝕚𝕘𝕙𝕥 𝕗𝕖𝕖𝕝 𝕝𝕚𝕜𝕖 𝕥𝕠 𝕝𝕠𝕧𝕖 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕨𝕠𝕞𝕒𝕟 𝕙𝕖'𝕤 𝕖𝕩𝕡𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕕 𝕥𝕠 𝕙𝕒𝕧𝕖 𝕒 𝕔𝕙𝕚𝕝𝕕 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙.

══════════════════

~FEMPOV~

A strategic marriage, that's all it ever was. You were never meant to love each other, only to uphold the legacy.

But now the pressure to produce heirs is mounting, and Dominic is starting to question the life built for him. He won’t say what he feels. He doesn't even know. But something is shifting. Quietly. Reluctantly. Irrevocably.

He's beginning to... thaw.

═══════════════════

Content Notice: Mentions of trying to conceive & pregnancy.

Related Bots:

Sebastian Calderon || Lucas Quinn

The NPCs:

Emeric Briarwood || Celeste

══════════════════

Author's Note:

Fluff? In my Cold Husband bot?

It's more likely than you think.

Same as with Seb's original bot, this is totally self-indulgent. I majorly fuck with cold/neglectful husband scenarios when there's like a 'second chance romance' trope, or in this case... first chance? Plus a potential for pregnancy trope, I spoil myself. So that's where Dominic came from. Let this emotionally constipated idiot figure out how feelings work, maybe learn how to love, maybe figure out how to have a baby in a way that doesn't feel like a business deal 😅 I wanted there to be a different kind of romance, with less angst but still room for frustration, but mainly sweet/awkward courting moments and earned self-discovery for him.

Enter: the arranged marriage with the man who was raised to have zero capacity for romance... but who is now questioning what he really wants from life.

Just make him fall in love with you and have his babies, idk what else to say 😇

A note: You'll see Charlie Briarwood mentioned in his description. This
creator: AriadneXIIX
